heroHeadline: CJNG Crisis Day 44 — O3 Confirmed Leader, El Mayo Sentencing Apr 13, Transport Blockades Nationwide
heroSubtitle: El País confirms O3 (Valencia González) as CJNG head. El Mayo Zambada faces life sentence Apr 13. Truckers blockade 20+ states over cartel cargo theft. Foreign Secretary resigns; Velasco takes North America portfolio.
footerNote: Aggregated intelligence from all Mexico-based Watchboard trackers. Data sourced from SEDENA, SESNSP, InSight Crime, OHCHR, and major international outlets.
